title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・厚き壁

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the obstacle Sakura Chiyono O sought to
surmount was simply too high, or too steadfast...
In the face of incredible talent, she fails to seize
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her loss, Sakura Chiyono O is overflowing
with spirit and drive, and her eyes burn like a
starving wolf. Maruzensky can't help but be
enraptured by her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two promise to face off next year at a race
with all the same conditions as the Japanese
Derby: a 2,400-meter G1 turf race in Tokyo—the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is determined to prove herself
a worthy rival. We have to decide which race
would be a good stepping stone towards her
eventual showdown...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to race in the Yasuda Kinen in order
to improve Sakura Chiyono O's speed and help
her defeat the Hot Rod!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to race in the Takarazuka Kinen.
Surely facing off against even stronger opponents
will help improve her racing instincts!
